  • Uses of PlayableChar in Unnamed Package

    Methods in Unnamed Package with parameters of type PlayableChar
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    Game.displayDungeonMenu(Dungeon dungeon, int index, PlayableChar Yohane)
    Refreshes display lines tracking operational statistics, mapping metadata indexes, and delegates control to paint structural tiles.
    static void
    Game.displayGameMenu(PlayableChar Yohane, Dungeon dungeon)
    Loops choices allowing the character to transition into physical environments, check collected storage structures, or yield activities.
    static void
    Game.displayInventory(PlayableChar Yohane)
    Pauses procedural states to write out tabular listings capturing metadata naming parameters for all held item entities currently tracked inside storage.
    static void
    Game.displayStats(PlayableChar Yohane)
     
    static void
    Game.runDungeon(PlayableChar Yohane, Dungeon dungeon)
    Manages step sequences, user input updates, turn increments, enemy actions, and victory state verifications inside an active floor scenario.

  • Uses of PlayableChar in Character_Classes

    Methods in Character_Classes with parameters of type PlayableChar
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    EnemyChar.detectPlayer(Tile[][] map, PlayableChar Yohane)
    Calculates whether the player character is within the enemy's detection range using Manhattan distance calculation.
    void
    EnemyChar.move(Floor floor, PlayableChar entity)
    Manages the enemy's turn execution.

  • Uses of PlayableChar in Dungeon_Classes

    Methods in Dungeon_Classes with parameters of type PlayableChar
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    Floor.completeFloor(PlayableChar entity)
    Checks if the user-controlled character stands directly on top of the escape Exit structure, qualifying them to successfully finish exploration on this map level layer.
    void
    Floor.displayMap(PlayableChar player)
    Compiles and outputs colorized display strings to print the visual map grid out, handling priority layer overlays for the player character and active enemy status transformations.
    boolean
    Dungeon.gameOver(PlayableChar entity)
    Monitors the user's survival state.
    boolean
    Dungeon.isCompleted(PlayableChar entity)
    Evaluates dungeon completion by checking the termination status of the final floor within the array stack.

  • Uses of PlayableChar in Item_Classes

    Methods in Item_Classes with parameters of type PlayableChar
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    ConsumableItem.use(PlayableChar player)
    Applies the item's curative property to the targeted player character.
    boolean
    Item.use(PlayableChar player)
    Triggers the inherent game mechanic behavior tied to item consumption or equipment.
